message:
feat(session): implement Unit of Work pattern (bd-2fyh)

Add unit_of_work.rs module that provides the complete Unit of Work pattern:

- UnitOfWork struct: tracks new/dirty/deleted objects
- Automatic dirty detection via change tracker integration
- FK-based dependency ordering using FlushOrderer
- Cycle detection before flush (DFS-based)
- compute_flush_plan() returns ordered FlushPlan
- PendingCounts for operation statistics

This unblocks:
- bd-1566: Instance lifecycle events
- bd-zy3: Session.is_modified() for dirty checking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
